  1. com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api
  2. Representation

Uses of Interface
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api.Representation

Packages that use Representation
Package
Description
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api
Primary framework abstractions for algorithms, models, populations and optimization problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api.defaults
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.plugins
Plugin metadata and dependency contracts.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.experiments.factory
Factories that assemble runtime components from config/plugins.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous
Probabilistic models for continuous search spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete
Probabilistic models for discrete/binary search spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete.token
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.permutation
Probabilistic models for permutation spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.impl
Representation implementations and validators.

  • Uses of Representation in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api

    Methods in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api that return Representation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Representation<G>
    AlgorithmContext.representation()
     
    Methods in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api with parameters of type Representation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Population<G>
    NichingPolicy.apply(Population<G> population, Representation<G> representation, RngStream rng)
    Applies niching post-processing to a population.
    G
    ConstraintHandling.enforce(G candidate, Representation<G> representation, Problem<G> problem, RngStream rng)
    Repairs or rejects-and-resamples candidate solutions.
    void
    Model.fit(List<Individual<G>> selected, Representation<G> representation, RngStream rng)
    Fits model parameters from selected individuals.
    Individual<G>
    LocalSearch.refine(Individual<G> individual, Problem<G> problem, Representation<G> representation, RngStream rng)
    Applies local search and returns the refined individual.
    AlgorithmContext.Builder<G>
    AlgorithmContext.Builder.representation(Representation<G> representation)
     
    Population<G>
    RestartPolicy.restart(AlgorithmState<G> state, Representation<G> representation, RngStream rng)
    Builds a restarted population.
    List<G>
    Model.sample(int count, Representation<G> representation, Problem<G> problem, ConstraintHandling<G> constraintHandling, RngStream rng)
    Samples new genotypes from model.
    default void
    Model.update(Individual<G> individual, double learningRate, Representation<G> representation, RngStream rng)
    Optional online update for incremental models.

  • Uses of Representation in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.impl

    Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.impl that implement Representation
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    BitStringRepresentation
    Bitstring representation implementation.
    final class 
    CategoricalVectorRepresentation
    Categorical vector representation with per-position symbol draw.
    final class 
    GrammarBitStringRepresentation
    Fixed-length bitstring representation for grammar-encoded GP trees.
    final class 
    IntVectorRepresentation
    Bounded integer vector representation.
    final class 
    MixedDiscreteVectorRepresentation
    Mixed discrete representation modeled as integer-coded attributes with cardinalities.
    final class 
    MixedRealDiscreteVectorRepresentation
    Mixed real/discrete representation.
    final class 
    PermutationVectorRepresentation
    Permutation representation built with in-place Fisher-Yates shuffle.
    final class 
    RealVectorRepresentation
    Real vector representation with optional per-dimension bounds.
    final class 
    VariableLengthVectorRepresentation
    Minimal variable-length integer token representation scaffold.
